evidence_rows.reading: V1.9 opened lawfully as a bounded breadth-evidence re-review phase.
The current re-review has already refreshed promotion shortfalls using the bounded breadth evidence collected in V1.8C.
The branch remains below promotion threshold, so closure should preserve the refreshed bounded judgment rather than force promotion.

interpretation: V1.9 has now answered its core question: whether the first bounded breadth collection changes promotion judgment for the breadth-target features.
It changed shortfall ordering for one feature and partially reduced the breadth gap for the other, but neither feature reached promotion-ready status.
Per the autonomy policy, the correct move is to enter waiting state until a new owner phase switch or trigger appears.
